chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 56 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Aurangzeb, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdus Samad Khan, AD (Legal) NADRA. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Statement filed on behalf of the respondent is taken on record. Per order dated 27.02.2023, passed in CP D 6944 of 2022 direct recourse to writ jurisdiction is not warranted. Prima facie, the remedy before the Grievance Commissioner is not exhausted. In view hereof, no case is made out, hence, this petition is dismissed alongwith pending applications. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
